section: Form A cover — 2018 Financial Disclosure Statement
free_text:
# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## 2018 FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE STATEMENT — Form A (For Use by Members, Officers, and Employees)

Stamped: HAND DELIVERED — Legislative Resource Center — 2019 AUG -8 AM 10:18 — Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives (Office Use Only). "A late penalty shall be assessed against any individual who files more than 30 days late."

**Name:** Rohit Khanna  
**Daytime Telephone:** 202-225-2631

**FILER STATUS:** [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17  
[ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ___  
Staff Filer Type (If Applicable): Shared [ ]  Principal Assistant [ ]

**REPORT TYPE:** [X] 2018 Annual (Due: May 15, 2019)  [ ] Amendment  [ ] Termination (Date of Termination: ___)

## PRELIMINARY INFORMATION — ANSWER EACH OF THESE QUESTIONS

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|----------|--------|
| A | Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child: (a) Own any reportable asset worth more than $1,000 at the end of the reporting period? or (b) Receive more than $200 in unearned income from any reportable asset during the reporting period? | **Yes** |
| B | Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child purchase, sell, or exchange any securities or reportable real estate in a transaction exceeding $1,000 during the reporting period? | **Yes** |
| C | Did you or your spouse have "earned" income (e.g., salaries, honoraria, or pension/IRA distributions) of $200 or more during the reporting period? | **No** |
| D | Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child have any reportable liability (more than $10,000) at any point during the reporting period? | **Yes** |
| E | Did you hold any reportable positions during the reporting period or in the current calendar year up through the date of filing? | **Yes** |
| F | Did you have any reportable agreement or arrangement with an outside entity during the reporting period or in the current calendar year up through the date of filing? | **No** |
| G | Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child receive any reportable gift(s) totaling more than $390 in value from a single source during the reporting period? | **No** |
| H | Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child receive any reportable travel or reimbursements for travel totaling more than $390 in value from a single source during the reporting period? | **No** |
| I | Did any individual or organization make a donation to charity in lieu of paying you for a speech, appearance, or article during the reporting period? | **No** |

ATTACH THE CORRESPONDING SCHEDULE IF YOU ANSWER "YES"

## IPO AND EXCLUSION OF SPOUSE, DEPENDENT, OR TRUST INFORMATION — ANSWER EACH OF THESE QUESTIONS

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| IPO — Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering during the reporting period? | **No** |
| TRUSTS — Have you excluded from this report details of a "Qualified Blind Trust" or certain other "excepted trusts" that benefits you, your spouse, or dependent child? | **No** |
| EXEMPTION — Have you excluded from this report any other assets, "unearned" income, transactions, or liabilities of a spouse or your dependent child because they meet all three tests for exemption? | **No** |

Handwritten initials "MC" at top right.
